name: normalcf-fastapi
description: Minimal FastAPI app on Cloudflare Python Workers

scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute normalcf-lab --local --file=./migrations/0001_lab.sql && wrangler d1 execute normalcf-lab --local --file=./migrations/0002_lab_gap.sql && wrangler d1 execute normalcf-lab --local --file=./migrations/0003_defend_fields.sql && wrangler d1 execute normalcf-lab --local --file=./migrations/0004_lab_ops.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute normalcf-lab --remote --file=./migrations/0001_lab.sql && wrangler d1 execute normalcf-lab --remote --file=./migrations/0002_lab_gap.sql && wrangler d1 execute normalcf-lab --remote --file=./migrations/0003_defend_fields.sql && wrangler d1 execute normalcf-lab --remote --file=./migrations/0004_lab_ops.sql
